activities_projects.title: Mean of Two Numbers
activities_projects.objective: Understand how the mean lies between two numbers
steps: Write five pairs of numbers
Calculate the mean of each pair
Mark the mean between the numbers on a number line
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands mean as the center value

activities_projects.title: Dot Plot Creation
activities_projects.objective: Represent data using a dot plot
steps: Collect data of marks of 10 students
Draw a number line
Place dots representing each value
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct and neat dot plot (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Mean Balance Activity
activities_projects.objective: Visualise the mean as a balance point
steps: Write a data set of five numbers
Find the mean
Calculate the distance of each number from the mean

activities_projects.title: Adding a Value Experiment
activities_projects.objective: Observe how mean changes when a value is added
steps: Choose five numbers
Find their mean
Add a number greater than the mean and calculate the new mean
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognises effect of new values on mean

activities_projects.title: Median Finder
activities_projects.objective: Learn how to determine the median
steps: Write ten random numbers
Arrange them in ascending order
Identify the median value

activities_projects.title: Frequency Table Practice
steps: Create a table of numbers and frequencies
Multiply each number by its frequency
Calculate the mean using the formula

activities_projects.title: Spreadsheet Average
activities_projects.objective: Use spreadsheet tools to calculate averages
steps: Enter marks of students in rows
Use the AVERAGE formula
Find the average marks of each subject

activities_projects.title: Line Graph Drawing
activities_projects.objective: Visualise data using a line graph
steps: Collect temperature data for 7 days
Plot days on the horizontal axis
Join the plotted points with lines

activities_projects.title: Rainfall Graph Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Interpret patterns from a line graph
steps: Observe a rainfall line graph
Identify highest and lowest rainfall months
Write observations

activities_projects.title: Daily Activity Strip
steps: Divide a strip into 48 blocks representing 30 minutes each
Colour blocks based on activities
Analyse time spent on each activity
